name: problem-list-item
title: Problem List Item
description: One entry on a patient's problem list — status dot, diagnosis name, an ICD-10 code chip with a Tooltip, onset, and severity. Resolved problems are de-emphasized, never hidden.

props.name: code
props.description: Coded identifier (e.g. ICD-10), shown as a mono chip with a Tooltip.

props.name: codeSystem
props.description: Coding system named in the code Tooltip.

clinicalNotes: The problem list is the clinical spine of the chart — resolved and inactive problems are de-emphasized (muted + strikethrough) but must remain visible for history, never removed. Status is carried by a labeled dot with a Tooltip AND a text badge, never color alone. The code is presented as data (mono, tabular) with the coding system disclosed on hover so ICD-10 vs SNOMED is never ambiguous. Severity maps to the shared badge tones (mild=secondary, moderate=warning, severe=destructive).
notes: Layer-M1 atom (core EHR gap). Feeds ProblemListPanel and PatientSummaryPanel (M2).
